title: the Savings Bank General (Amendment) Rules, 1999.
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 340] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JULY 6,1999/ASADHA 15, 1921 1995 GI/99 (1) -- 1 of 10 -- 2 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART I I — S E C . 3 ( I ) ] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th July, 1999 G.S.R. 490(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Savings Bank General Rules, 1981, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Savings Bank General (Amendment) Rules, 1999. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Savings Bank General Rules, 1981, in rule 13, in sub-rule 4, - (1) in clauses (a) and (b), for the words "twenty thousand rupees" the words "sixty thousand rupees" shall be substituted; (2) in clause (b), for the Table, the following Table shall be substituted, namely :- -- 2 of 10 -- 3 " Table Name of Authority (i) Departmental Sub-Postmasters in Time Scale Post Offices. (ii) Sub-Postmasters of Lower Selection Grade Post Offices. (iii) Sub-Postmasters/ Deputy. Postmasters/ Postmasters in Higher Selection Grade ( All Non-Gazetted). (iv) Deputy Postmasters/ Senior Postmasters/ Deputy Chief Post masters/ Superintendent of Post Offices/ Deputy Superintendent of Post Offices {All Gazetted Group -B) (v) Chief Postmasters in Head Offices, Senior Superintendents of Post Offices. (Al/ Group -A) . (vi) Regional Directors/ Director (General Post offices) [ In Mumbai & Calcutta] (vii) Chief Post Masters General/ Post Masters General ( Head Quarter & Region) Limit (In Rs) 500 1,000 2,000 10,000 25,000 40,000 60,000 [F. No. 12/4/97-NS-II] S.D. PAUL, Under Secy. Note:The principal rules were published vide notification GSR 662 (E) dated 17.12.1981 and amended vide GSR 483 (E) dated 10.6.1983,723(E) dated 4.9.85 and GSR 1000(E) dated 1-1-1990 -- 3 of 10 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th July, 1999 G.S.R, 49l(E).—in exercise of the powers conferred by section 12 of the Government Savings Certificates Act, 1959 (46 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the National Savings Certificate (VIII Issue) Rules, 1989, namely:- -- 4 of 10 -- 5 1. (1) These rules may be called the National Savings Certificate (VIII Issue) (Amendment) Rules, 1999. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Savings Certificate (VIM Issue) Rules, 1989, in rule 20,- (1) in sub-rule (1), for the letters and figures "Rs.20,000" the letters and figures "Rs.60,000" shall be substituted; (2) in sub-rule (2), for the Table, the following Table shall be substituted, namely :- " Table (i) (ii) (Hi) (iv) (v) Name of Authority Departmental Sub-Postmasters in Time Scale Post Offices. Sub-Postmasters of Lower Selection Grade Post Offices. Sub-Postmasters/ Deputy. Postmasters/ Postmasters in Higher Selection Grade (All Non-Gazetted). Deputy Postmasters/ Senior Postmasters/ Deputy Chief Post masters/ Superintendent of Post Offices/ Deputy Superintendent of Post Offices {All Gazetted Group -B) Chief Postmasters in Head Offices, Senior Superintendents of Post Offices.Al/ Group -A) Limit (in Rs) 500 1,000 2,000 10,000 25,000 -- 5 of 10 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (vi) (vii) Regional Directors/ Director (General Post offices) [ In Mumbai & Calcutta] Chief Post Masters General/ Post Masters General ( Head Quarter & Region) 40,000 60,000 [F. No. 12/4/97-NS-II] S.D. PAUL, Under Secy. Note:The principal rules were published vide GSR No. 496(E) dated 1.5.1989 and amended vide GSR No. 508(E) dated 23.5.1990, GSR No. 120(E) dated 8.3.1998 and GSR No. 7(E) dated 1.1.1999. -- 6 of 10 -- 7 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th July, 1999 G.S.R. 492(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 12 of the Government Savings Certificates Act, 1959 (46 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Kisan Vikas Patra Rules, 1988, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Kisan Vikas Patra (Amendment) Rules, 1999. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Kisan Vikas Patra Rules, 1988, in rule 26, - (a) in sub-rule (1), - (i) in clause (a), for the letters and figures "Rs.20,000" the letters and figures "Rs. 60,000" shall be substituted; (ii) in clause (b), for the Table, the following Table shall be substituted, namely :- -- 7 of 10 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] " T a b l e (i) (ii) (iii) (iv) (v) (vi) (vii) Name of Authority Departmental Sub-Postmasters in Time Scale Post Offices. Sub-Postmasters of Lower Selection Grade Post Offices. Sub-Postmasters/ Deputy. Postmasters/ Postmasters in Higher Selection Grade ( A l l Non-Gazetted). Deputy Postmasters/ Senior Postmasters/ Deputy Chief Post masters/ Superintendent of Post Offices/ Deputy Superintendent of Post Offices {All Gazetted Group -B) Chief Postmasters in Head Offices, Senior Superintendents of Post Offices.(All Group -A) . Regional Directors/ Director (General Post offices) [ In Mumbai & Calcutta] Chief Post Masters General/ Post Masters General ( Head Quarter & Region) Limit (In Rs) 500 1,000 2,000 1 0 , 0 0 0 2 5 , 0 0 0 4 0 , 0 0 0 60,000 -- 8 of 10 -- 9 (b) i n sub-rule (2), for the betters and figures Rs. "20,000 " the fetters a n d figures "Rs. 60,000" shall b e substituted. [F No. 12/4/97-NS-E] S.D PAUL, Under Secy. Note: T h e princlplal wdes were published vide notification G S R 3 7 0 (E) dated 22.3.1988 and amended vide GSR 81 (E) dated 6.2.1989, GSR 8 (E) dated 4.1.1990, GSR 728(E), dated 6.12.1991, GSR 432(E) dated 2 4 . 4 . 1 9 9 2 , GSR 5 6 7 (E) dated 2 0 . 8 . 1 9 9 3 , GSR 588 (E) d a t e d 2.9,4993, a n d GSR 4(E) dated 1.1.1999. 1995 GI/99-2 Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapur, New Delhi-110054 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 -- 9 of 10 -- -- 10 of 10 --
